---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug to help us improve MovieMonk
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened.

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain the problem.

## Environment

- **Browser:** (e.g., Chrome 120, Safari 17, Firefox 121)
- **Device:** (e.g., iPhone 15, Pixel 8, Desktop)
- **OS:** (e.g., iOS 17, Android 14, macOS Sonoma, Windows 11)
- **Viewport:** (e.g., mobile, tablet, desktop)

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here (e.g., console errors, network tab info, related issues).
